summary: Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed against public URL (auth, docs CRUD, chat w/ citations, search, clusters, KG, lit-review, research-gaps, hypothesis). Frontend: end-to-end UI flow validated — landing renders, register→/app redirect, all 8 sidebar nav routes work, document upload via file picker adds a row, chat returns Claude Sonnet 4.5 answer with [1] citation chip and Sources list.

minor.issue: Pydantic EmailStr rejects the spec's test domain '@researchmind.test' (reserved TLD) with HTTP 422. Spec said to use that pattern — either update spec to use @example.com OR relax EmailStr (EmailStr(allowed_special_use=True)) / use plain str + custom validation.
These do synchronous Claude calls in request thread; response latencies are 15–40s. No timeout/streaming. Consider background tasks or websocket streaming for production.

issues: Confidence badge 30% may look low even on a good answer because formula = mean(score). Consider rescaling.

action_items: Either change registration email validator to accept .test TLD or document that .test/.example/.invalid TLDs are blocked; UI uses @example.com fine.
Optional: cache LLM calls for clusters/KG (KG already caches; add for clusters/review) to speed retries.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — chat_send/clusters/etc do LLM calls in request path; FastAPI default timeout could break behind some proxies. Consider streaming responses.
llm_service.py — _extract_json finds first '{' and last '}'; if both '{' and '[' appear it always prefers '{', may mis-parse arrays-at-top-level (acceptable here since all schemas are objects).
auth.py — JWT_SECRET hard-required from env (good). bcrypt used correctly. No refresh-token rotation (acceptable for MVP).
server.py — uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; switch to lifespan handler.
server.py — full_text capped at 200000 chars; chunks stored in document doc — Mongo 16MB limit could be hit on very large PDFs. Consider GridFS for full_text.
test_credentials: Registered ephemeral users via /api/auth/register (email pattern uitest_<uuid>@example.com / TestPass123!). No persistent admin needed.
seed_data_creation: None — each test run registers a new user and uploads sample .txt content.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_researchmind.py. IMPORTANT: must use @example.com (not @*.test) due to pydantic EmailStr reserved-TLD rejection. LLM-backed tests (chat, clusters, KG, literature-review, research-gaps, hypothesis) take 15–40s each; total suite ~2m10s.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failures after switching test email domain.
